title: Welcome!
text:
My name is Jenna Baljunas, and I study community ecology!


Currently, I am a PhD student in the Spatial and Community Ecology (SpaCE) Lab at Michigan State University and a part of the Department of Integrative Biology and Ecology, Evolution, and Behavior program.

  
  







Particularly, I am interested in how communities respond to environmental change.


My dissertation research focuses on the effects of climate change on tropical communities.
